nodes.name: Google Docs — Append Updates
nodes.notes: Appends filtered items to the Pi-CEO Workspace Intel Google Doc. Requires Google OAuth2 credentials in n8n and WORKSPACE_INTEL_DOC_ID env var.

parameters.jsCode:
console.log(`ℹ️ No new keyword-matching Workspace updates at ${new Date().toISOString()}`);
return [{ json: { skipped: true } }];

meta.description: RA-826 — Polls the Google Workspace Updates RSS feed every 6 hours, filters for AI-relevant posts (Gemini, MCP, NotebookLM, agents, automation), appends matching items to a Google Doc (NotebookLM source), and stores them via Pi-CEO for weekly brief generation.

environment_variables_required: PI_CEO_WEBHOOK_SECRET   — value of TAO_WEBHOOK_SECRET from Railway env vars
WORKSPACE_INTEL_DOC_ID  — Google Doc ID from URL: docs.google.com/document/d/<ID>/edit
credentials_required: Google OAuth2 — create in n8n Settings → Credentials → New → Google OAuth2 API. Scope: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/documents
google_doc_setup: 1. Create a new Google Doc titled 'Pi-CEO Workspace Intel'
2. Copy the Document ID from the URL (the long string between /d/ and /edit)
3. Set WORKSPACE_INTEL_DOC_ID in n8n env vars
4. Add this Google Doc as a source in the NotebookLM 'Pi-CEO Intel' notebook
5. NotebookLM will pick up new content on the next notebook sync (manual trigger in NotebookLM UI)
_setup.import_instructions: In n8n: Workflows → Import from file → select this JSON. Configure env vars in n8n Settings → Environment Variables. Activate the workflow.
